case.title: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION v. FRUIT GROWERS' EXP

opinion.h1: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION v. FRUIT GROWERS' EXP, 261 U.S. 629 (1923)
opinion.h2: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION, PETITIONER, v. FRUIT GROWERS' EXPRESS (Inc.). No. 172.
opinion.p: Dismissed per stipulation, on motion of Mr. Solicitor General Beck in that behalf.
